description: Ready-to-use Miro board templates for facilitating interactive team sessions — from sprint retrospectives and brainstorming workshops to design thinking exercises and team icebreakers.

templates.name: Sprint Retrospective — Sailboat Metaphor
templates.description: Structured sprint retro using the Sailboat metaphor with reflection and action items

templates.name: Brainstorm Session
templates.description: Structured brainstorming with silent ideation, voting, and action planning

templates.name: Design Thinking Workshop
templates.description: Full 5-phase design thinking workshop: Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test

templates.name: Icebreaker Activities
templates.description: Team icebreaker activities for building rapport and psychological safety

templates.name: World Cafe Discussion
templates.description: World Cafe discussion format with rotating tables and collective insight harvesting
